channel.title: Mástoras Blog - Business Clarity & Storytelling
channel.description: Insights on business strategy, brand storytelling, grant writing, and consultancy for Northern Irish businesses and community organizations.

item.title: Welcome to Mástoras - Structure → Story → Soul
item.description: How we help Northern Irish businesses cut through the noise with honest advice and compelling storytelling.
item.author: hello.mastoras@gmail.com (Gary Nicholl)
